name: The Big Swedish Pancake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a casserole dish that is 9 inches in diameter.
2. Melt the butter and coat the bottom and sides of the dish with it.
3. Mix honey with milk and stir into flour.
4. Beat eggs until very light and stir into the flour mixture until well blended.
5. Pour the mixture into the casserole dish.
6. Bake in a preheated oven at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 to 35 minutes, or until puffed and browned.
7. Serve with fruit preserves or syrup. Serves 4.
